pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Kotlin compiler and standard library to version 2.0.0.
Change the Kotlin compiler's JVM target from 1.8 to 17 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new Java baseline.

.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Change the CI environment to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 13.

.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Change the build environment from JDK 13 to JDK 17 as part of the Java version migration.
